name: ZenKit CLI Tool
description: The zenkit CLI provides validate, benchmark, audit, init, and status commands.

acceptance_criteria.description: CLI entry point exists and is executable
CLI exports a bin field in package.json

verification.command: npx tsx bin/zenkit.ts validate handoff benchmark/fixtures/valid-handoff.json

acceptance_criteria.description: Package has repository field for npm

constraints: CLI must work via npx tsx without compilation step
All commands must exit 0 on success, non-zero on failure
limitations: Verifies commands exit successfully, not that their output is semantically correct
Does not test zenkit init in isolation (tested in unit tests)
Does not test zenkit audit (slow — runs all benchmarks recursively)
